CVE-2012-5656.title: The rasterization process in Inkscape before 0.48.4 allows local  ...
CVE-2012-5656.description: The rasterization process in Inkscape before 0.48.4 allows local users to read arbitrary files via an external entity in a SVG file, aka an XML external entity (XXE) injection attack.

CVE-2012-6076.title: Inkscape before 0.48.4 reads .eps files from /tmp instead of the  ...
CVE-2012-6076.description: Inkscape before 0.48.4 reads .eps files from /tmp instead of the current directory, which might cause Inkspace to process unintended files, allow local users to obtain sensitive information, and possibly have other unspecified impacts.

CVE-2020-12825.title: libcroco through 0.6.13 has excessive recursion in cr_parser_pars ...
CVE-2020-12825.description: libcroco through 0.6.13 has excessive recursion in cr_parser_parse_any_core in cr-parser.c, leading to stack consumption.

CVE-2021-42700.description: Inkscape 0.91 is vulnerable to an out-of-bounds read, which may allow an attacker to have access to unauthorized information.
